value.found_quote: That policy can be customized per enterprise with `guardian_policy_config` or per user with local [`[auto_review].policy`](/codex/config-advanced#approval-policies-and-sandbox-modes).
value.rationale: The page describes Codex Auto-review's reviewer policy as customizable per enterprise (via guardian_policy_config) or per user (via local [auto_review].policy), directly substantiating the claim that OpenAI offers reviewer policy customization per enterprise or per user. The feature is described as currently functional/available.
